globalNews.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
globalNews.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

globalNews.title: Protests in Ukrainian cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
globalNews.summary: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.

globalNews.title: Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia
globalNews.summary: Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine.

globalNews.title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
globalNews.summary: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.

globalNews.title: More than 800 Canadian wildfires burning as air quality alerts extend to US
globalNews.summary: The air quality in large parts of Michigan, Minneapolis and Minnesota is deemed "hazardous" by authorities.

cryptoNews.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
cryptoNews.summary: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

cryptoNews.title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
cryptoNews.summary: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

cryptoNews.title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
cryptoNews.summary: Prediction markets reached a record $113.8 billion in notional volume in Q2 as spot CEX trading, derivatives volume and stablecoin market cap declined.

cryptoNews.title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
cryptoNews.summary: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.

cryptoNews.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
cryptoNews.summary: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.

aiNews.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
aiNews.summary: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

aiNews.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
aiNews.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

aiNews.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
aiNews.summary: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

aiNews.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
aiNews.summary: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

aiNews.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
aiNews.summary: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
